stimulus:
Welcome

Thank you for taking part in this study. You will judge the naturalness of short Turkish sentences based on your intuition.

There are no right or wrong answers. Please respond quickly and honestly using the full 5-point scale.

Instructions

  • You will see one sentence at a time.
  • Use the buttons from 1 to 5 to rate how natural each sentence sounds.
  • 1 means completely unnatural.
  • 5 means completely natural.
  • Please use your first intuition.
  • The sentences will appear in random order.

Bıçak ekmeği kesti.
How natural does this sentence sound based on your intuition?

Klima odayı soğuttu.
How natural does this sentence sound based on your intuition?
